title: Song: Healthy Habits
objectives: Reinforce first conditional and health vocabulary through song

key_concepts.explanation:
Verse 1: If I eat my vegetables, I will grow up strong, / If I drink my water, I will play all day long. / If I sleep early, I will smile at the sun, / Ready for new adventures, ready for fun.

Verse 2: If we keep on trying, we will feel bright, / If we choose good habits, we will do things right. / If we stay active, we will jump so high / Healthy hearts are full of light.

Verse 3: If I wash my hands, I will stay fresh and clean, / If I brush my teeth, I will smile so bright. / If I smile big, I will feel so light / Healthy, happy living grows year by year.

teaching_notes: Every line uses the first conditional structure (If + present simple, will + base verb) — perfect for drilling grammar through music. Health habits covered: eating vegetables, drinking water, sleeping early, staying active, washing hands, brushing teeth. Values: responsibility for health, positive attitude.
